description: Run an SSM Converge configuration inline. Requires ssm-converge to be installed (use SSMConverge-Install first). The configuration is responsible for calling report_compliance at the end.

Mode.description: enforce = fix drift, audit = report drift only, destroy = tear down resources

Profile.description: Profile name. Appears in the report and in /var/lib/ssm-converge/drift.log.

Report.description: summary = one-line header after the run, full = detailed compliance report

Config.description: The configuration body — a bash script that sources lib.sh and declares resources. Must call report_compliance at the end. Base64-encoded; use `base64` to encode your configuration file before passing it.

runCommand: echo '[ssm-converge] ERROR: Library not found at {{ InstallPath }}/lib.sh'
# Decode the base64-encoded configuration into a temp file, then execute it.
# Base64 sidesteps all quoting / newline / StringList issues.
